pattern: Basic Entry Point plus Safe protocol
entry_checklist: Wait for a false break and return back through the zone.
Split position conceptually into two half-size units for paper-trading simulation.
Move the remaining simulated unit to breakeven only after price reaches one stop distance.
invalidation_rules: Price holds beyond the reversal zone.
The stop distance cannot be defined before entry.
The risk rule cannot be expressed in account-risk terms.
avoid_if: A buyer asks for live exchange order placement.
Market is news-driven or liquidity is abnormal.
The strategy card lacks source_ids, entry trigger, invalidation, or risk rule.
